About

I'm the marketer who actually moves the needle

I'm a digital marketer who turns scroll-stopping content into engagement gold and yes, I have the analytics to prove it.

Armed with an MSc in Digital Marketing from Newcastle University and a track record of making algorithms work overtime, I specialise in social media strategy, SEO, and campaigns that actually convert.

When I'm not analysing metrics or debating the perfect posting time, I'm probably designing something in Canva, hunting for the next trending audio, or convincing brands that yes, they do need another Instagram Reel.

D2C Strategy Lab

Brands I've studied, uninvited

Independent concepts, not paid work. These are unsolicited brand strategies I developed to demonstrate how I think across Indian D2C and Gulf markets. I identified the problem, built the strategy, and mapped what I'd measure. No client brief. Just conviction.

Independent Concept

✦ This is an independent strategy concept developed without a client brief. It is not a deliverable, it is a demonstration of strategic thinking applied to a brand I believe in.

Selected Work

Content I have created

Three brands, three audiences, three different creative challenges. Here is the work.

01
Nucha
Fashion and Lifestyle
Content strategy, design, and copywriting for Nucha, a sustainable fashion marketplace. Built content pillars around conscious style, community storytelling, and resale culture.
GrewFollowers by 10%
Scroll-StoppingCampaigns Built
02
NM House of Nations
College Committee, Social Media Manager
Managed all social media for a college-level Model UN committee. Designed sponsor graphics, event announcements, and committee delegate content under a consistent visual identity.
3Content Formats Managed
FullBrand System Built
03
Moodwear
Women's Wellness, Social Media Intern
Built an Instagram presence from zero for a women's stress and hormone wellness brand. Created the brand voice, visual system, and content calendar. Above-average saves rate across all educational posts.
0Followers When I Joined
HighSave Rate on Edu Content

A little more about me

✈️
Moved countries solo
Packed up and moved to an entirely new country for my Master's with zero friends, zero plan, and 100% audacity. Comfort zones? Never heard of her.
📚
Amazon book cover designer
Before marketing, I designed book covers for Amazon sellers. Yes, judging books by their covers is literally a professional skill of mine.

Baking YouTuber
Ran a baking channel convincing people that buttercream roses were totally achievable. Spoiler: they weren't, but the views were real.
